```{r}
                               data = ((rmss_with_api_env_data_61d_lag_NEW_ages__prov_final_interp_ages) ), nAGQ = 0 ,
                               control = glmerControl(optimizer = "Nelder_Mead", 
                                                      optCtrl = list(maxfun=2e5)))


mod_i1_interactions_rdate <- glmer(discard ~ pm_2_5_median_61d + ns(heat_index_median_61d) + angus + age + (1|bull_code) + (1|date) + pm_2_5_median_61d*angus,
                               family = binomial('logit'),
                               data = ((rmss_with_api_env_data_61d_lag_NEW_ages__prov_final_interp_ages) ), nAGQ = 0 ,
                               control = glmerControl(optimizer = "Nelder_Mead", 
                                                      optCtrl = list(maxfun=2e5)))






### mod_iel 2


mod_i2_primary <- glmer(discard ~ pm_2_5_median_61d + ns(heat_index_median_61d) + smoke_exposed_season_sum_61d + angus + age + (1|bull_code),
                               family = binomial('logit'),
                               data = ((rmss_with_api_env_data_61d_lag_NEW_ages__prov_final_interp_ages) ), nAGQ = 0 ,
                               control = glmerControl(optimizer = "Nelder_Mead", 
                                                      optCtrl = list(maxfun=2e5)))


mod_i2_primary_rdate <- glmer(discard ~ pm_2_5_median_61d + ns(heat_index_median_61d) +  smoke_exposed_season_sum_61d + angus + age  + (1|bull_code) + (1|date),
                               family = binomial('logit'),
                               data = ((rmss_with_api_env_data_61d_lag_NEW_ages__prov_final_interp_ages) ), nAGQ = 0 ,
                               control = glmerControl(optimizer = "Nelder_Mead", 
                                                      optCtrl = list(maxfun=2e5)))
###############

mod_i2_interactions <- glmer(discard ~ pm_2_5_median_61d + ns(heat_index_median_61d) + smoke_exposed_season_sum_61d + angus + age +  (1|bull_code) + pm_2_5_median_61d*angus + smoke_exposed_season_sum_61d*angus,
                               family = binomial('logit'),
                               data = ((rmss_with_api_env_data_61d_lag_NEW_ages__prov_final_interp_ages) ), nAGQ = 0 ,
                               control = glmerControl(optimizer = "Nelder_Mead", 
                                                      optCtrl = list(maxfun=2e5)))


mod_i2_interactions_rdate <- glmer(discard ~ pm_2_5_median_61d + ns(heat_index_median_61d) +  smoke_exposed_season_sum_61d+angus + age + (1|bull_code) + (1|date) + pm_2_5_median_61d*angus + smoke_exposed_season_sum_61d*angus,
                               family = binomial('logit'),
                               data = ((rmss_with_api_env_data_61d_lag_NEW_ages__prov_final_interp_ages) ), nAGQ = 0 ,
                               control = glmerControl(optimizer = "Nelder_Mead", 
                                                      optCtrl = list(maxfun=2e5)))


### mod_iel 3

mod_i3_primary <- glmer(discard ~ pm_2_5_median_61d + ns(heat_index_median_61d) + smoke_exposed_season_sum_61d+ angus + age+  pm_10_median_61d + o3_median_61d + co_median_61d +  so2_median_61d + (1|bull_code),
                               family = binomial('logit'),
                               data = ((rmss_with_api_env_data_61d_lag_NEW_ages__prov_final_interp_ages) ), nAGQ = 0 ,
                               control = glmerControl(optimizer = "Nelder_Mead", 
                                                      optCtrl = list(maxfun=2e5)))


mod_i3_primary_rdate <- glmer(discard ~ pm_2_5_median_61d + ns(heat_index_median_61d) +  smoke_exposed_season_sum_61d+angus + age  +  pm_10_median_61d + o3_median_61d + co_median_61d +  so2_median_61d + (1|bull_code) + (1|date),
                               family = binomial('logit'),
                               data = ((rmss_with_api_env_data_61d_lag_NEW_ages__prov_final_interp_ages) ), nAGQ = 0 ,
                               control = glmerControl(optimizer = "Nelder_Mead", 
                                                      optCtrl = list(maxfun=2e5)))
###############

mod_i3_interactions <- glmer(discard ~ pm_2_5_median_61d + ns(heat_index_median_61d) + smoke_exposed_season_sum_61d + angus + age +  pm_10_median_61d + o3_median_61d + co_median_61d +  so2_median_61d + (1|bull_code) + pm_2_5_median_61d*angus + smoke_exposed_season_sum_61d*angus,
                               family = binomial('logit'),
                               data = ((rmss_with_api_env_data_61d_lag_NEW_ages__prov_final_interp_ages) ), nAGQ = 0 ,
                               control = glmerControl(optimizer = "Nelder_Mead", 
                                                      optCtrl = list(maxfun=2e5)))


mod_i3_interactions_rdate <- glmer(discard ~ pm_2_5_median_61d + ns(heat_index_median_61d) +  smoke_exposed_season_sum_61d+angus + age  +  pm_10_median_61d + o3_median_61d + co_median_61d +  so2_median_61d + (1|bull_code) + (1|date) + pm_2_5_median_61d*angus + smoke_exposed_season_sum_61d*angus,
                               family = binomial('logit'),
                               data = ((rmss_with_api_env_data_61d_lag_NEW_ages__prov_final_interp_ages) ), nAGQ = 0 ,
                               control = glmerControl(optimizer = "Nelder_Mead", 
                                                      optCtrl = list(maxfun=2e5)))

```

saving
```{r}

save(mod1_primary_rdate, mod1_interactions_rdate, mod2_primary_rdate, mod2_interactions_rdate, mod3_primary_rdate, mod3_interactions_rdate, file = "final_models_update.RData")


```

# Sensitivity analysis: Removing breed terms
  # realizing these are going to be identical (no more breed to have interactions), so can collapse

```{r}
### mod_nb_el 1

mod_nb_1_rdate <- glmer(discard ~ pm_2_5_median_61d + ns(heat_index_median_61d) + age  + (1|bull_code) + (1|date),
                               family = binomial('logit'),
                               data = ((rmss_with_api_env_data_61d_lag_NEW_ages__prov_final) ), nAGQ = 0 ,
                               control = glmerControl(optimizer = "Nelder_Mead", 
                                                      optCtrl = list(maxfun=2e5)))
### model 2


mod_nb_2_rdate <- glmer(discard ~ pm_2_5_median_61d + ns(heat_index_median_61d) + smoke_exposed_season_sum_61d + age +  (1|bull_code) + (1|date),
                               family = binomial('logit'),
                               data = ((rmss_with_api_env_data_61d_lag_NEW_ages__prov_final) ), nAGQ = 0 ,
                               control = glmerControl(optimizer = "Nelder_Mead", 
                                                      optCtrl = list(maxfun=2e5)))

### mod_nb_el 3

mod_nb_3_rdate <- glmer(discard ~ pm_2_5_median_61d + ns(heat_index_median_61d) +  smoke_exposed_season_sum_61d + age  +  pm_10_median_61d + o3_median_61d + co_median_61d +  so2_median_61d + (1|bull_code) + (1|date),
                               family = binomial('logit'),
                               data = ((rmss_with_api_env_data_61d_lag_NEW_ages__prov_final) ), nAGQ = 0 ,
                               control = glmerControl(optimizer = "Nelder_Mead", 
                                                      optCtrl = list(maxfun=2e5)))
###############

```

saving
```{r}

save(mod_nb_1_rdate, mod_nb_2_rdate, mod_nb_3_rdate, file = "final_models_nb_updated.RData")


```

###########3


# summary table

```{r}

# should have right order of parameter names now; still trying to see how to override default model labels

sjPlot::tab_model(mod1_primary_rdate, mod1_interactions_rdate, mod2_primary_rdate, mod2_interactions_rdate, mod3_primary_rdate, mod3_interactions_rdate, show.intercept = F, show.loglik = T, pred.labels = c("PM2.5 (61-Day Median; ug/m3)", "Heat Index (61-Day Median; nonlinear)", "Breed (British)", "Age (years)", "PM2.5-by-Breed Interaction (British)", "Smoke Days (61-Day Sum)", "Smoke-by-Breed Interaction (British)",  "PM10 (61-Day Median; ug/m3)", "Ozone (61-Day Median; 100 ppm)", "Carbon Monoxide (61-Day Median; 10 ppm)", "Sulfur Dioxide (61-Day Median; 10 ppm"), bootstrap = F, show.aic = T)

```

# without breed

```{r}

# should have right order of parameter names now; still trying to see how to override default model labels

sjPlot::tab_model(mod_nb_1_rdate, mod_nb_2_rdate, mod_nb_3_rdate, show.intercept = F, show.loglik = T, pred.labels = c("PM2.5 (61-Day Median; ug/m3)", "Heat Index (61-Day Median; nonlinear)", "Age (years)", "Smoke Days (61-Day Sum)",  "PM10 (61-Day Median; ug/m3)", "Ozone (61-Day Median; 100 ppm)", "Carbon Monoxide (61-Day Median; 10 ppm)", "Sulfur Dioxide (61-Day Median; 10 ppm"), bootstrap = F, show.aic = T)

```


# Figured out how to do facetting (just need to create a new dataframe from predictions, etc.)

```{r}
data.frame(prediction = as.numeric(predict(mod2_interactions_rdate, type = "response")), observed = mod2_interactions_rdate@frame$discard, breed_group = as.factor(mod2_interactions_rdate@frame$angus)) %>% mutate(observed = case_when(observed == TRUE ~ "Discard", observed == FALSE ~ "Pending"), breed_group = case_when(breed_group == TRUE ~ "British", breed_group == FALSE ~ "Continental")) %>% ggplot() + geom_density(aes(x = prediction, color = observed)) + theme_minimal() +scale_color_manual(values = c("red4", "cyan3")) + labs(x = "Predicted Discard Probability", y = "Density (Observations)", color = "True Sample Outcome")

data.frame(prediction = as.numeric(predict(mod2_interactions_rdate, type = "response")), observed = mod2_interactions_rdate@frame$discard, breed_group = as.factor(mod2_interactions_rdate@frame$angus)) %>% mutate(observed = case_when(observed == TRUE ~ "Discard", observed == FALSE ~ "Pending"), breed_group = case_when(breed_group == TRUE ~ "British", breed_group == FALSE ~ "Continental")) %>% ggplot() + geom_density(aes(x = prediction, color = observed)) + theme_minimal() +scale_color_manual(values = c("red4", "cyan3")) + labs(x = "Predicted Discard Probability", y = "Density (Observations)", color = "True Sample Outcome") + facet_wrap(. ~ breed_group, nrow = 2)

```



OK, Visualizations; think Wilcoxon tests don't carry much extra information


# summary models;

```{r}

# PM2.5 + smoke

ggplot() +
    aes(y = 100*(predict(mod2_interactions_rdate,
                         type = "response")),
        x = mod2_interactions_rdate@frame$pm_2_5_median_61d) +
    geom_vline(color = 'grey70', xintercept = as.numeric(quantile(mod2_interactions_rdate@frame$pm_2_5_median_61d, probs = c(0.025, 0.975)))) +
    #geom_point(aes(shape = (mod2_interactions_rdate@frame$angus %>% forcats::fct_recode("British" = "TRUE",
    geom_point(aes(color = mod2_interactions_rdate@frame$smoke_exposed_season_sum_61d),
               alpha  = 0.5, size = 1.5) +
    geom_smooth(color = 'black', aes(linetype = mod2_interactions_rdate@frame$angus %>% forcats::fct_recode("British" = "TRUE", "Continental" = "FALSE")),
                se = FALSE) +
    geom_smooth(linewidth = 1.5, color = "black", se = FALSE) +
    scale_color_viridis_c(option = 'viridis', direction = -1) + 
  #scale_linetype_manual(values = c(1,3)) +
    #scale_color_manual(values = c("#6ca7dfff", "#ffe88aff")) +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(
        #title = "Predicted Sample Discard Probability",
        x = "Median 61-Day PM2.5 (ug/m3)",
        y = "Sample Discard Probability (%)",
        linetype = "Breed Group",
        color = "Smoke Days\n (of 61)") 

# by outcome
ggplot() +
    aes(y = 100*(predict(mod2_interactions_rdate,
                         type = "response")),
        x = mod2_interactions_rdate@frame$pm_2_5_median_61d) +
  geom_vline(color = 'grey70', xintercept = as.numeric(quantile(mod2_interactions_rdate@frame$pm_2_5_median_61d, probs = c(0.025, 0.975)))) +
    #geom_point(aes(shape = (mod2_interactions_rdate@frame$angus %>% forcats::fct_recode("British" = "TRUE",
    geom_point(aes(
      #color = mod2_interactions_rdate@frame$angus %>% forcats::fct_recode("British" = "TRUE", "Continental" = "FALSE"),
      color = mod2_interactions_rdate@frame$discard %>%
                       as.factor() %>%
                       forcats::fct_recode("Discard" = "TRUE", "Pending" = "FALSE")),
               alpha  = 0.5, size = 1.5) +
#    geom_smooth(aes(color = mod2_interactions_rdate@frame$angus %>% forcats::fct_recode("British" = "TRUE", "Continental" = "FALSE")),
#                se = FALSE) +
      geom_smooth(color = 'black', aes(linetype = mod2_interactions_rdate@frame$angus %>% forcats::fct_recode("British" = "TRUE", "Continental" = "FALSE")),
                se = FALSE) +
    geom_smooth(linewidth = 1.5, color = "black", se = FALSE) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c('cyan4', 'red2')) +
    #scale_color_manual(values = c("#ffe88aff", "#63a2ddff")) +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(
        #title = "Predicted Sample Discard Probability",
        x = "Median 61-Day PM2.5 (ug/m3)",
        y = "Sample Discard Probability (%)",
      #  color = "Breed Group",
        linetype = "Breed Group",
        color = "Sample Status") 


```


# map


```{r}


library(devtools)
library(tidyterra)
library(maptiles)

load("../01_5_processed_data/smokepolys_intersects.rda")

# note: EPSG:6427 is in meters, so doesn't match at least `mapView`; try `WGS84` or `EPSG:4326
  # oh, also should confirm that HMS data behaves how I expect
  # OK, 3 monitors (2 PM10, one ozone) at least nominally included outside boundary for 0.75 degrees

#library(basemapR)

load(file ="../01_5_processed_data/epa_aqs_bbox_all.rda")


library(maptiles)
osm_tiles <- get_tiles(x = (epa_aqs_bbox_all %>%
                          dplyr::select(latitude, longitude) %>%
                            unique() %>%
                          rbind(data.frame(latitude = 39.74039751943014,
                             longitude = -104.52398743305764)) %>% 
                          st_as_sf(coords = c("longitude", "latitude"),
                                   crs = "WGS84")),
                       provider = "CartoDB.Positron", 
                       zoom = 10,
                       crop = TRUE)

smokepoly_tiles <- get_tiles(x = smokepolys_intersects,
                             crop = TRUE,
                             provider = "CartoDB.Positron")
    # zoom = 10 seems about right; maybe could go a bit higher?
      # loading rime goes up appreciable after ~10
        # resolution appears a bit iffy
        # renders as really pixelated even with larger export image
# takes a bit to run with original zoom (presumably higher = more detail?)
  # huh--looks way too big as well? Includes most of New Mexico, for instance.
    # Oh, the points show up correctly when I combine--issue is that I guess zoom=5 tiles are just huge

# basic example 
#plot(osm_tiles)

#(epa_aqs_bbox_all %>%
#    dplyr::select(latitude, longitude) %>%
#    st_as_sf(coords = c("longitude", "latitude"),
#             crs = "WGS84")) %>% 
#  plot( add = T)

# comes out noticeably pixelated, which increases with a higher 'zoom' setting


# need larger point sizes



rmss_site_buffer <- data.frame(latitude = 39.74039751943014,
                        longitude = -104.52398743305764)  %>%
  sf::st_as_sf(coords = c("longitude", "latitude"), crs = "EPSG:4326") %>%
  st_buffer(dist = 60000)

comb_map <- ggplot() +
   geom_spatraster_rgb(data = osm_tiles,
                       interpolate = TRUE) + 
    geom_sf(aes(geometry = geometry, 
                color = parameter,
                shape = parameter),
            size = 4,
          data = (epa_aqs_bbox_all %>% 
                    dplyr::select(date_local,parameter, 
                                  site_number, latitude,
                                  site_address,longitude, datum)) %>% 
            sf::st_as_sf(coords = c("longitude", "latitude"), 
                         crs = "EPSG:4326") %>% 
            unique()) + 
  scale_shape_manual(values = c(0,1,2,6,5)) +
  scale_color_viridis_d(option = 'turbo') +
    geom_sf_text(aes(geometry = geometry),
          label = "\u272a",
          size = 6,
          color = 'cyan3',
          data = (data.frame(latitude = 39.74039751943014,
                             longitude = -104.52398743305764) %>% 
                    sf::st_as_sf(coords =c("longitude", 
                                           "latitude"), 
                                 crs = "EPSG:4326"))) +
   #geom_sf(aes(geometry = geometry),
  #        alpha = 0.1,
  #        data = rmss_site_buffer) +
  geom_sf_text(aes(geometry = geometry),
          label = "\u2708",
          angle = 45,
          color = "cyan3",
          size = 5,
          data = (data.frame(latitude = 39.789861249198474,
                             longitude= -104.54965013746597)  %>%
                    sf::st_as_sf(coords = c("longitude", "latitude"),
                                 crs = "EPSG:4326"))) +
  theme_void()

save(comb_map, file = "../03_output/comb_map.rda")

# smoke map

ggplot() +
  geom_sf_text(aes(geometry = geometry),
          label = "\u272a",
          size = 5,
          color = 'cyan3',
          data = (data.frame(latitude = 39.74039751943014,
                             longitude = -104.52398743305764) %>% 
                    sf::st_as_sf(coords =c("longitude", 
                                           "latitude"), 
                                 crs = "EPSG:4326"))) +
    geom_spatraster_rgb(data = smokepoly_tiles,
                        interpolate = TRUE) +
    geom_sf(aes(geometry = geometry),
            data = smokepolys_intersects,
            alpha = 0.1) +
  theme_void()
  

```
